title: Microsoft 365 Copilot: From Basics to Fluent
modules: What Copilot Actually Does Across the M365 Suite — and What It Doesn't
Word, Outlook, and Teams: Practical Workflows That Save Real Time
Excel and PowerPoint Copilot: Analysis, Visualization, and Presentation
Organizational Data, Privacy Boundaries, and Safe Use Policies
Advanced Scenarios: Copilot Studio, Agents, and Cross-App Automation
synopsis: Microsoft 365 Copilot is already embedded in the tools most professionals use every day — the question is whether you are using it strategically or barely at all. This course delivers an honest, workflow-first guide to Copilot's real capabilities across Word, Excel, Teams, Outlook, and PowerPoint, including where it underdelivers and how to work around its limits.
rationale: M365 Copilot is one of the fastest-expanding enterprise AI deployments globally, yet most licensed users lack the contextual knowledge to move beyond surface-level prompts into genuine productivity gains.
learning_outcome: Integrate Copilot into at least three recurring professional workflows across M365 applications, with a working understanding of data privacy boundaries and organizational governance requirements.
source_signals: Windows 11 adds AI agent that runs in background with access to personal folders (score: 2617)
nearest_existing: The Centaur and the Tool: Frameworks for Human-AI Teaming
